title: Brothy Honey-Dijon Chicken & Chickpeas
summary: A cosy bowl of chickpea and lentil broth loaded with shredded chicken and zingy lemon. An easy weeknight win made using our Honey-Dijon Chicken & Pepper Traybake batch recipe.

ingredients.label: 1 x 400g Can Chickpeas, drained (drained weight approx. 240g)
ingredients.name: Chickpeas

method.description: Before you begin, make the Honey-Dijon Chicken & Pepper Traybake Batch recipe.
Scoop the vegetables from the traybake into a blender with the chicken stock. Blitz until smooth for a silky base, or leave chunky for more texture.
Shred the chicken using two forks. Drain the chickpeas. Pick the parsley leaves, discarding the stems.
Pour the blended stock into a saucepan and add the shredded chicken, chickpeas, and cooked lentils. Place over a medium heat and bring to a gentle simmer until everything is piping hot.
Taste and season with salt, black pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Ladle into bowls, top each with a dollop of Greek yoghurt and a scattering of parsley leaves. Serve with the remaining lemon wedges.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
